description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory, with a global before_script that runs `yarn`. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs `yarn test`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `yarn build`, then `rm -rf public`, then `mv build public`, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
